form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 60 day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 2.5 len at this track February 6 over 1400m defeating Thank Ryu carrying 56kg at $1.80. The race before that 2nd of 11 at Nagoya on December 24 over 1500m, 1.5 len behind Sarasara Hair carrying 57kg at $3.30. Big chance to go back-to-back.
